source.title: Claude Science, an AI workbench for scientists

capabilities.label: Single research environment
capabilities.public_description: Coordinate literature, multi-step research, artifacts, refinement, and handoff in one environment.

capabilities.label: Auditable artifact history
capabilities.public_description: Preserve code, environment, inputs, descriptions, and history needed to inspect and reproduce outputs.

capabilities.label: Local, SSH, and HPC access
capabilities.public_description: Work locally on macOS or Linux and connect to remote or HPC environments.

capabilities.label: Curated scientific skills and connectors
capabilities.public_description: Use a broad preconfigured ecosystem spanning specialist scientific domains, databases, tools, and models.

capabilities.label: Specialist and reviewer agents
capabilities.public_description: Coordinate specialist agents and independently inspect citations, calculations, figures, and provenance.

capabilities.label: Native rich scientific rendering
capabilities.public_description: Render structures, molecules, genome tracks, figures, and manuscripts interactively.

capabilities.label: Managed elastic compute
capabilities.public_description: Plan, authorize, submit, monitor, and recover local, cluster, GPU, or on-demand compute.

capabilities.label: Session forking and durable memory
capabilities.public_description: Resume work across sessions and compare branches without losing the original research state.

capabilities.label: Custom tools and reusable pipelines
capabilities.public_description: Connect trusted lab tools and save validated workflows as reusable capabilities.

boundary: This is a public-feature conformance map, not access to Claude Science source code, private prompts, licensed connectors, model weights, or proprietary UI.
